deliveredDomains: deterministic simulation, event queue, replay/checksum and schema-v13 persistence

resource economy, stability, storage, buildings, research and production
fleets, core missions, colonization, combat v2, debris and reports
logistics routes, market, pirates, expeditions, space objects and world events
planetary defense damage and repair lifecycle

production presentation, operations center, local ranking and accessibility runtime
per-hull weapon, armor and cargo upgrades with deterministic queue and combat effects
fleet formations, target priorities and original class skills
command doctrine progression, battle experience and flagship fleet appointments

complete cross-domain project audit and stabilization recommendations

knownLimitations: Veyra still uses the explicit Aegis legacy-alias catalog until PR #81
Veyra does not yet have native building, research, ship, defense or migration coverage
bot decision timing is runtime-only and does not catch up every skipped decision interval
command and event logs can grow without an explicit long-session budget
a complete victory and defeat loop is not yet playable
diplomacy, coalitions, strategic stars and final endgame are missing
bots do not yet plan command doctrine or diplomacy
strategic exotic matter has no complete spending loop

runtimeAssets.connected: galaxy, fleet, development, command identity and native Synod mechanical presentation
runtimeAssets.remainingIntegration: optional raster UI skins and a dedicated Synod technology atlas remain deferred
